title: Geometry dash font
description: Add The font from geometry dash
body:
Bring the bold, futuristic style of Geometry Dash into Minecraft with this font pack! This resource pack replaces Minecraft’s default text with the iconic Geometry Dash typeface, giving menus, chat, and in-game text a sharper, more arcade-like aesthetic. Perfect for players who want their game to feel more vibrant, modern, and in sync with the energy of Geometry Dash.

### If your gonna showcase/distrubute any of my packs anywhere e.g youtube, discord then you must use the modrinth link

## [Check out my other packs here!](https://modrinth.com/user/JJ_00_EPICS)
